introText: Mother tells Little Red Riding Hood that Grandmother is sick. They must prepare a basket to bring to her. Help order the story scenes correctly!

cards.description: Mother and Little Red Riding Hood prepare the basket together
Mother gives the basket to Little Red Riding Hood
Little Red Riding Hood puts on her red cloak
Little Red Riding Hood leaves the house

learningOutcome: You learned: Story events happen in ORDER — each action makes the next one possible!
rewardText: Amazing! You sorted all the scenes in the right order! Now Little Red Riding Hood can pick up her basket, put on her red cloak, and skip through the forest to bring some tasty treats to Grandma. The story can go on — all thanks to YOU!

introText: Little Red Riding Hood sets off alone into the deep forest. She walks peacefully along the path, surrounded by tall trees. Can you put the story scenes in the right order?

cards.description: Little Red Riding Hood walks along the forest path, basket in hand
She spots beautiful colorful flowers growing beside the path
She picks the flowers and wanders off the path, distracted
She strays far from the path, lost in collecting flowers

learningOutcome: You learned: Distractions change where a story goes — the ORDER of choices matters!
rewardText: Incredible! You got every scene in the right order! You followed Little Red Riding Hood's journey through the forest perfectly — step by step, all the way to where she strayed from the path. You are a true story hero and guardian of the forest! Watch out — there's a wolf watching her from behind the trees…

introText: The wolf has spotted Little Red Riding Hood in the forest. He watches her carefully, thinking of a clever plan. Little Red Riding Hood has no idea that the wolf is watching... Help order the story scenes correctly!

cards.description: The wolf thinks of a plan to reach Grandmother's house
The wolf appears on the path where Little Red Riding Hood is walking
The wolf asks: 'Where are you going, little girl?'
Little Red Riding Hood tells the wolf: 'I'm going to Grandmother's house'

learningOutcome: You learned: CONSEQUENCES = ACTIONS HAVE RESULTS
rewardText: Now the wolf knows where to find Grandmother. What will happen next?
